title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Software Engineer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
